scopes.label: Per-station tools
scopes.note: Shared by one station — a cluster of about 4 teams with tables grouped together

components.name: Bambu Lab A1 Mini
components.notes: Basic 3D printer for PLA and PETG

components.name: Bambu Lab X2D
components.notes: High end 3D printer for composite nylon parts and flexible TPU

components.name: 8" Bandsaw
components.notes: For cutting tubes and plates

components.name: Mini Drill Press
components.notes: For drilling holes into plates

components.name: Mini Sander
components.notes: Roundin' corners

components.name: Calipers
components.notes: For all kinds of measurements

components.name: Screwdriver Kit
components.notes: Turn those screws

components.name: Flush Cutters
components.notes: Cut wires and CAD screw-ups

components.name: Bench vise
components.notes: Mounted at the station's shared workbench

components.name: Soldering Iron
components.notes: Connect dem wires!! Electrical upgrade members receive private soldering irons.

components.name: Multimeter
components.notes: Debug dem circuits!! Electrical upgrade members receive private multimeters.

components.name: Kitbot
components.notes: Prebuilt with bumpers, a custom power distribution PCB, an Echo microcontroller, and mecanum drive.

components.name: 3DBuffalo Echo
components.notes: Main microcontroller for the robot. Includes six motor drivers, 10 servo ports, and 16 GPIO ports

components.name: Power distribution PCB
components.notes: TBD

components.name: Battery
components.notes: TBD

components.name: GPIO expander
components.notes: For electrical upgrade teams only

components.name: Battery charging hub
components.notes: Shared charging for the station's teams

components.name: Timing Belt + Pulley Kit
components.notes: GT2 6mm wide

components.name: M2 Screws
components.notes: Will include nuts, bolts, and heat inserts. Sizes and counts TBD

components.notes: Will include nuts, bolts, and heat inserts. Sizes and counts TBD

components.name: Aluminium stock
components.notes: Tube, angle, and sheet — drawn as needed

components.name: PLA
components.notes: Enough for most basic prints

components.name: PETG
components.notes: For those parts where PLA won't cut it

components.name: TPU
components.notes: For compliant mechanisms and everything flex. Only accessible to mechanical upgrade participants.

components.name: Carbon Fiber Nylon
components.notes: For parts where strength is everything. Only accessible to mechanical upgrade participants.

components.name: Onshape
components.notes: Education licence provided

components.name: WPILib
components.notes: Preinstalled on loaner laptops

components.name: Mechanical resource upgrade
components.notes: Extra machine time and stock access for teams with strong fabrication skill sets

components.name: Electrical resource upgrade
components.notes: Expanded wiring, sensor, and power component access for teams with strong electrical skill sets

components.name: Software resource upgrade
components.notes: Additional licensed tooling and compute access for teams with strong software skill sets
